name: Contact with the Aquamirror
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>儀</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぎ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>水</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>すい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>鏡</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>との<ruby lang="jp"><rb>交</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>信</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
name_jp_tl: Communication with the Ceremonial Water Mirror
desc:
If you control a WATER monster: Activate 1 of these effects, or if you control a WATER Ritual Monster, you can activate both of these effects, in sequence;
● Look at all Set cards in your opponent's Spell & Trap Zone.
● Look at the top 2 cards of either player's Deck, then place them on the top of the Deck in any order.

action: Looks at cards from the top of the player's Deck
Looks at cards from the top of the opponent's Deck
Places cards from the player's Deck on the top of the Deck
Places cards from the opponent's Deck on the top of the Deck
